title: GitHub - Yarmoluk/ckg-agentforce: Salesforce AgentForce as a traversable knowledge graph — 40 nodes, /resolution billing path, MCP-native
excerpt: Salesforce AgentForce as a traversable knowledge graph — 40 nodes, /resolution billing path, MCP-native - Yarmoluk/ckg-agentforce
content_html:
ckg-agentforce — AgentForce as a traversable knowledge graph

An auditable knowledge graph for Salesforce AgentForce — deterministic agent answers with full source traceability.

AgentForce charges $2 per autonomous resolution. Every failed resolution is a retry, a CSAT hit, and $2 with no outcome. Wrong inference is expensive here. The graph declares what the agent should already know — so it doesn't have to infer it.

Every edge traces to a declared relationship and a SHA-256-pinned source document. Built for Salesforce architects, platform engineers, and agent developers who need verifiable answers about AgentForce dependencies, billing paths, trust layer policy, and deployment patterns — not model inference.

Not a general-purpose semantic search layer. If it's not a declared edge, the graph doesn't return it.

pip install ckg-agentforce
# or: uvx ckg-agentforce

PyPI · GitHub · Benchmark paper · graphifymd.com

What it is

40 nodes · 52 edges · the full AgentForce stack as a typed dependency graph. Pre-structured, traversable, deterministic. Served over MCP. No inference at query time.

get_prerequisites("Autonomous Resolution")

→ Autonomous Resolution          ← $2/event billing trigger
  ├─ [REQUIRES] Resolution Criteria
  ├─ [REQUIRES] Audit Trail
  │    └─ [REQUIRES] Einstein Trust Layer
  │         ├─ [REQUIRES] AgentForce Platform
  │         └─ [REQUIRES] Reasoning Engine
  └─ [REQUIRES] Policy Enforcement
       └─ [REQUIRES] Einstein Trust Layer

  269 tokens · declared edges only · no inference
  RAG equivalent: ~2,982 tokens · probabilistic

query_ckg("Einstein Trust Layer")

→ Dependents (what it gates):
  ← [REQUIRES] Data Masking
  ← [REQUIRES] Audit Trail
  ← [REQUIRES] Zero Data Retention
  ← [REQUIRES] Grounding
  ← [REQUIRES] Einstein Agent
  ← [REQUIRES] Policy Enforcement

Six capabilities gate on this one node. RAG returns six separate docs.
The graph knows — it's a declared edge.

Source provenance — verifiable to the byte

Every node carries a source_url and a source_hash (SHA-256 of the source document's bytes at extraction time). An edge isn't just asserted from a source — it's pinned to a specific version of it.

# Verify any node's source hasn't changed since extraction
curl -s https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.einstein_ai_trust_layer.htm | sha256sum
# expected: cc11eedeee761e083a591cd20bbbdf46d2942906519dc5f8e51e617857118cda

The full audit chain:

edge answer
  → graph commit hash       (git log -- agentforce.csv)
  → source_content_hash     (sha256 of page bytes at extraction time)
  → knowledge_source_ref    (URL — fetch hint, not trust anchor)

A hash mismatch means either the source changed (stale edge → re-extract) or the graph was patched without re-fetching (silent edit → investigate). No judgment required. Run scripts/refresh_hashes.py to recompute.

Via MCP — verify_source("Einstein Trust Layer"):

source_url:  https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.einstein_ai_trust_layer.htm
source_hash: sha256:cc11eedeee761e083a591cd20bbbdf46d2942906519dc5f8e51e617857118cda
verify:      curl -s '<url>' | sha256sum

Reference implementation of knowledge_source_ref + source_content_hash from GuardrailDecisionV1.

What developers are actually hitting

Signal from Salesforce developer forums, Trailblazer Community, and hands-on deployments.

01 — The $2 retry problem. An agent misidentifies the resolution path. It attempts resolution, fails criteria, retries — $4 spent, zero outcome. The billing trigger lives four hops from Einstein Agent. Agents that don't traverse the full chain get it wrong.

02 — "Which policy tier is blocking my agent?" Einstein Trust Layer gates six downstream capabilities. Architects can't tell whether a blocked agent is hitting Data Masking, Zero Data Retention, or Policy Enforcement without traversing the dependency chain manually. The graph makes it a one-hop query.

03 — The Grounding Source Gap. AgentForce Grounding REQUIRES Knowledge Base, which REQUIRES Data Cloud. Most implementations skip Data Cloud and wonder why Grounding is unreliable. The graph shows the prerequisite chain; RAG returns the docs separately.

04 — NVIDIA NIM integration path. AgentForce Model Selection ENABLES Reasoning Engine, which has an IMPLEMENTS edge to NVIDIA NIM. Developers searching for the NIM integration path get inconsistent Salesforce docs. The declared edge makes it deterministic.

Declared relationships, not confidence scores

Every edge was extracted from a Salesforce source document and given a type. No probabilistic weights, no cosine similarity scores, no confidence intervals. An edge either exists — declared, typed, sourced — or it doesn't. When the answer isn't in the graph, the traversal returns nothing rather than a hallucinated approximation.

Edge types:

Type Meaning Example
REQUIRES Hard prerequisite — A cannot function without B Einstein Trust Layer REQUIRES AgentForce Platform
ENABLES Capability unlock — A makes B possible Model Selection ENABLES Reasoning Engine
IMPLEMENTS Concrete instantiation of an abstract concept NVIDIA NIM IMPLEMENTS Reasoning Engine
RELATES_TO Conceptual proximity, no dependency direction Data Masking RELATES_TO Zero Data Retention

Why no confidence levels? The edge type is the confidence signal. REQUIRES means load-bearing and sourced; RELATES_TO means real but weaker. A missing edge is silence from a source-grounded system — not a soft no, not a low-confidence guess.

✗ RAG:  "Einstein Trust Layer probably governs data access... (similarity: 0.79)"
        Score is on the chunk, not the claim. The claim itself is unverified.

✓ CKG:  "Einstein Trust Layer REQUIRES AgentForce Platform and gates six capabilities:
         Data Masking · Audit Trail · Zero Data Retention · Grounding · Einstein Agent · Policy Enforcement"
        No score. Declared edge. Traces to trust layer source doc.

A/B — AgentForce domain, local models, no GPU

30 questions on the $2/resolution billing path, trust layer, and action types · CPU only · Ollama · temperature 0

Category Bare model + CKG Lift
Billing path F1 0.091 0.201 +121%
Trust layer F1 0.063 0.134 +113%
Prereq-chain F1 0.058 0.142 +145%
Key-fact accuracy 8.1% 19.4% +11pp

Example — P01 (billing prereq chain):

Q: What must resolve before AgentForce charges the $2 resolution fee?
✗ Bare: "The agent completes the customer's request successfully..." [vague, misses billing trigger]
✓ CKG:  "Resolution Criteria must be satisfied, Audit Trail must log the event,
         and Policy Enforcement must clear — all gated by Einstein Trust Layer." [exact chain]

Example — L03 (action type lookup):

Q: What are the four AgentForce action types?
✗ Bare: "AgentForce supports Standard Actions, Custom Actions, and API Actions..." [misses MuleSoft]
✓ CKG:  "Flow Action · Apex Action · MuleSoft Action · External Action" [declared edges, correct]

Install

Add to claude.ai (no install required):

https://ckg-agentforce.onrender.com/mcp

Settings → Connectors → Add connector → paste URL.

Local — Claude Desktop / Claude Code:

pip install ckg-agentforce
# or
uvx ckg-agentforce
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agentforce": {
      "command": "uvx",
      "args": ["ckg-agentforce"]
    }
  }
}

Tools

  • list_concepts — List all 40 AgentForce concepts grouped by type
  • search_concepts — Fuzzy search across all concepts by keyword
  • query_ckg — Typed subgraph around any concept (1–5 hops)
  • get_prerequisites — Full upstream prerequisite chain for any concept
  • resolution_path — The exact $2/resolution billing traversal — every hop declared
  • verify_source — Source URL + SHA-256 hash for any concept (GuardrailDecisionV1)
Tool Args Description
list_concepts() — All 40 AgentForce concepts grouped by type
search_concepts(query) query: str Fuzzy search across all concepts
query_ckg(concept, depth) concept: str, depth: int 1–5 Typed subgraph around any concept
get_prerequisites(concept) concept: str Full upstream prerequisite chain
resolution_path() — The $2/resolution billing traversal — every hop declared
verify_source(concept) concept: str Source URL + SHA-256 hash · full audit chain

What's in the graph

40 nodes · 52 edges · 4 edge types: REQUIRES · ENABLES · IMPLEMENTS · RELATES_TO

Layer Concepts
Agents Einstein Agent · Service Agent · Sales Agent · Marketing Agent
Actions Flow Action · Apex Action · MuleSoft Action · External Action · Standard Action · Custom Action
Platform AgentForce Platform · Data Cloud · Salesforce CRM · Knowledge Base
Reasoning Reasoning Engine · Model Selection · NVIDIA NIM · Token Budget · Context Window
Trust Einstein Trust Layer · Data Masking · Zero Data Retention · Policy Enforcement · Compliance Rules
Workflow Agent Topic · Agent Instruction · Resolution Criteria · Conversation State · Grounding
Billing Autonomous Resolution ($2/event) · Audit Trail · Agent Metrics · Handoff to Human
Routing Omni-Channel Routing · Multi-Agent Orchestration · Prompt Template

Every node traces to an authoritative Salesforce source document. Every source is SHA-256 pinned.

Pro access — all 97 domains

Remote MCP connector · no install · paste one URL into claude.ai or Cursor
97 domains: NVIDIA · Finance · Healthcare · Regulatory · Enterprise AI
graphifymd.com/pro/

Sources

Every node and edge traces to one of these. No probabilistic inference — declared relationships only.

Type Source Coverage
Official developer.salesforce.com/docs/einstein/genai/guide/agentforce-overview.html Platform, agents, actions, grounding
Official Salesforce Einstein Trust Layer docs Trust, Data Masking, ZDR, Policy Enforcement
Official AgentForce billing and resolution docs Autonomous Resolution, $2/event trigger, Audit Trail
Official Data Cloud integration guide Data Cloud, Knowledge Base, Grounding chain
Official Model selection and NIM integration Reasoning Engine, NVIDIA NIM, Model Selection
Dataset huggingface.co/datasets/danyarm/ckg-benchmark KRB v0.6.2 — 7,928 queries
Benchmark github.com/Yarmoluk/ckg-benchmark/paper/main.pdf Full methodology, F1 0.471

Benchmark (KRB v0.6.2 locked)

System Macro F1 Mean tokens Cost / 1k queries
CKG 0.471 269 $7.81
RAG 0.123 2,982 $76.23
GraphRAG 0.120 ~3,000 ~$76

7,928 queries · 5-hop F1: 0.772 (CKG) vs 0.170 (RAG) · dataset · full paper

Licensing

Layer License Plain English
Server code — server.py, graph.py, serve.py, scripts/ MIT Do anything. Fork it, embed it, sell products built on it.
Graph data — domains/agentforce.csv + source hashes Elastic License 2.0 Free for all internal and commercial use. Cannot offer this graph as a competing hosted service.
Extraction pipeline + benchmark harness Proprietary — Graphify.md Not in this repo. How 97 domains get built and maintained.

Can I build an agent or product using this CKG? Yes. No restrictions.
Can I run this inside my company's infrastructure? Yes. ELv2 allows all internal commercial use.
Can I offer "AgentForce CKG as a Service" commercially? No. That's the one thing ELv2 blocks.

EVAL

benchmarked: false
rag_baseline_f1: 0.123
graphrag_baseline_f1: 0.120
mean_tokens: 269
paper: github.com/Yarmoluk/ckg-benchmark/blob/main/paper/main.pdf

Graphify.md builds CKGs for enterprise domains — AgentForce, NVIDIA, finance, healthcare, and custom stacks. If you need a knowledge graph for your platform, product, or internal knowledge base:

  • Try the hosted endpoint: ckg-agentforce.onrender.com — 50 free calls/day, then $29/mo

  • Benchmark paper: F1 0.471 · 11× fewer tokens than RAG

sentences.zh: 来自 Salesforce 开发者论坛、Trailblazer 社区和实践部署的信号。

blocks.html_en: 01 — The $2 retry problem. An agent misidentifies the resolution path. It attempts resolution, fails criteria, retries — $4 spent, zero outcome. The billing trigger lives four hops from Einstein Agent. Agents that don't traverse the full chain get it wrong.

sentences.zh: 01 — 2 美元重试问题。

sentences.en: An agent misidentifies the resolution path.
sentences.zh: 代理错误地识别了解析路径。

sentences.en: It attempts resolution, fails criteria, retries — $4 spent, zero outcome.
sentences.zh: 它尝试解决问题，不符合标准，然后重试——花费 4 美元，结果为零。

sentences.en: The billing trigger lives four hops from Einstein Agent.
sentences.zh: 计费触发器距 Einstein Agent 有四跳。

sentences.en: Agents that don't traverse the full chain get it wrong.
sentences.zh: 不遍历整个链条的代理会出错。

blocks.html_en: 02 — "Which policy tier is blocking my agent?" Einstein Trust Layer gates six downstream capabilities. Architects can't tell whether a blocked agent is hitting Data Masking, Zero Data Retention, or Policy Enforcement without traversing the dependency chain manually. The graph makes it a one-hop query.

sentences.en: 02 — "Which policy tier is blocking my agent?"
sentences.zh: 02 —“哪个策略层阻止了我的代理？”

sentences.en: Einstein Trust Layer gates six downstream capabilities.
sentences.zh: 爱因斯坦信任层控制六种下游功能。

sentences.en: Architects can't tell whether a blocked agent is hitting Data Masking, Zero Data Retention, or Policy Enforcement without traversing the dependency chain manually.
sentences.zh: 如果不手动遍历依赖链，架构师无法判断被阻止的代理是否遇到了数据屏蔽、零数据保留或策略执行。

sentences.en: The graph makes it a one-hop query.
sentences.zh: 该图使其成为一跳查询。

blocks.html_en: 03 — The Grounding Source Gap. AgentForce Grounding REQUIRES Knowledge Base, which REQUIRES Data Cloud. Most implementations skip Data Cloud and wonder why Grounding is unreliable. The graph shows the prerequisite chain; RAG returns the docs separately.

sentences.zh: 03 — 接地源间隙。

sentences.en: AgentForce Grounding REQUIRES Knowledge Base, which REQUIRES Data Cloud.
sentences.zh: AgentForce 接地需要知识库，知识库需要数据云。

sentences.en: Most implementations skip Data Cloud and wonder why Grounding is unreliable.
sentences.zh: 大多数实现都会跳过数据云并想知道为什么接地不可靠。

sentences.en: The graph shows the prerequisite chain; RAG returns the docs separately.
sentences.zh: 该图显示了先决条件链； RAG 单独返回文档。

blocks.html_en: 04 — NVIDIA NIM integration path. AgentForce Model Selection ENABLES Reasoning Engine, which has an IMPLEMENTS edge to NVIDIA NIM. Developers searching for the NIM integration path get inconsistent Salesforce docs. The declared edge makes it deterministic.

sentences.zh: 04 — NVIDIA NIM 集成路径。

sentences.en: AgentForce Model Selection ENABLES Reasoning Engine, which has an IMPLEMENTS edge to NVIDIA NIM.
sentences.zh: AgentForce 模型选择启用推理引擎，该引擎比 NVIDIA NIM 具有实现优势。

sentences.en: Developers searching for the NIM integration path get inconsistent Salesforce docs.
sentences.zh: 搜索 NIM 集成路径的开发人员会得到不一致的 Salesforce 文档。

sentences.en: The declared edge makes it deterministic.
sentences.zh: 声明的边缘使其具有确定性。

blocks.html_en: Declared relationships, not confidence scores

sentences.zh: 声明的关系，而不是置信度分数

blocks.html_en: Every edge was extracted from a Salesforce source document and given a type. No probabilistic weights, no cosine similarity scores, no confidence intervals. An edge either exists — declared, typed, sourced — or it doesn't. When the answer isn't in the graph, the traversal returns nothing rather than a hallucinated approximation.

sentences.en: Every edge was extracted from a Salesforce source document and given a type.
sentences.zh: 每条边都是从 Salesforce 源文档中提取的，并指定了一个类型。

sentences.en: No probabilistic weights, no cosine similarity scores, no confidence intervals.
sentences.zh: 没有概率权重，没有余弦相似度分数，没有置信区间。

sentences.en: An edge either exists — declared, typed, sourced — or it doesn't.
sentences.zh: 边要么存在——声明的、类型化的、来源的——要么不存在。

sentences.en: When the answer isn't in the graph, the traversal returns nothing rather than a hallucinated approximation.
sentences.zh: 当答案不在图中时，遍历不会返回任何内容，而只会返回幻觉的近似值。
边缘类型：
意义
例子
要求

sentences.en: Data Masking RELATES_TO Zero Data Retention
sentences.zh: 数据屏蔽 RELATES_TO 零数据保留

blocks.html_en: Why no confidence levels? The edge type is the confidence signal. REQUIRES means load-bearing and sourced; RELATES_TO means real but weaker. A missing edge is silence from a source-grounded system — not a soft no, not a low-confidence guess.

sentences.zh: 为什么没有置信水平？

sentences.en: The edge type is the confidence signal.
sentences.zh: 边缘类型是置信度信号。

sentences.en: REQUIRES means load-bearing and sourced; RELATES_TO means real but weaker.
sentences.zh: REQUIRES表示承重、有来源； RELATES_TO 表示真实但较弱。

sentences.en: A missing edge is silence from a source-grounded system — not a soft no, not a low-confidence guess.
sentences.zh: 缺失的优势是来自源头接地系统的沉默——不是软弱的拒绝，也不是低置信度的猜测。

content_html_zh:
ckg-agentforce — AgentForce 作为可遍历的知识图

Salesforce AgentForce 的可审核知识图 — 确定性代理答案，具有完整的源可追溯性。

AgentForce 对每个自主解决方案收费 2 美元。 每一次失败的解决方案都会重试、CSAT 命中以及没有结果的 2 美元。 错误的推论在这里代价高昂。 该图声明了代理应该已经知道的内容 - 因此它不必推断它。

每条边都可追溯到已声明的关系和 SHA-256 固定的源文档。 专为 Salesforce 架构师、平台工程师和代理开发人员构建，他们需要有关 AgentForce 依赖项、计费路径、信任层策略和部署模式的可验证答案，而不是模型推理。

不是通用语义搜索层。 如果它不是声明的边，则图表不会返回它。

pip install ckg-agentforce
# or: uvx ckg-agentforce

PyPI · GitHub · 基准论文 · graphifymd.com

它是什么

40 个节点·52 个边·完整的 AgentForce 堆栈作为类型依赖图。 预结构化、可遍历、确定性。 通过 MCP 服务。 查询时不进行推理。

get_prerequisites("Autonomous Resolution")

→ Autonomous Resolution          ← $2/event billing trigger
  ├─ [REQUIRES] Resolution Criteria
  ├─ [REQUIRES] Audit Trail
  │    └─ [REQUIRES] Einstein Trust Layer
  │         ├─ [REQUIRES] AgentForce Platform
  │         └─ [REQUIRES] Reasoning Engine
  └─ [REQUIRES] Policy Enforcement
       └─ [REQUIRES] Einstein Trust Layer

  269 tokens · declared edges only · no inference
  RAG equivalent: ~2,982 tokens · probabilistic

query_ckg("Einstein Trust Layer")

→ Dependents (what it gates):
  ← [REQUIRES] Data Masking
  ← [REQUIRES] Audit Trail
  ← [REQUIRES] Zero Data Retention
  ← [REQUIRES] Grounding
  ← [REQUIRES] Einstein Agent
  ← [REQUIRES] Policy Enforcement

Six capabilities gate on this one node. RAG returns six separate docs.
The graph knows — it's a declared edge.

源出处——可按字节验证

每个节点都带有一个 source_url 和一个 source_hash（提取时源文档字节的 SHA-256）。 优势不仅仅来自某个来源，它还固定在其特定版本上。

# Verify any node's source hasn't changed since extraction
curl -s https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.einstein_ai_trust_layer.htm | sha256sum
# expected: cc11eedeee761e083a591cd20bbbdf46d2942906519dc5f8e51e617857118cda

完整的审核链：

edge answer
  → graph commit hash       (git log -- agentforce.csv)
  → source_content_hash     (sha256 of page bytes at extraction time)
  → knowledge_source_ref    (URL — fetch hint, not trust anchor)

哈希不匹配意味着源已更改（陈旧边缘 → 重新提取）或图形已修补但未重新获取（静默编辑 → 调查）。 无需判断。 运行scripts/refresh_hashes.py 重新计算。

通过 MCP — verify_source("爱因斯坦信任层")：

source_url:  https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.einstein_ai_trust_layer.htm
source_hash: sha256:cc11eedeee761e083a591cd20bbbdf46d2942906519dc5f8e51e617857118cda
verify:      curl -s '<url>' | sha256sum

GuardrailDecisionV1 中的knowledge_source_ref + source_content_hash 的参考实现。

开发商实际上正在打击什么

来自 Salesforce 开发者论坛、Trailblazer 社区和实践部署的信号。

01 — 2 美元重试问题。 代理错误地识别了解析路径。 它尝试解决问题，不符合标准，然后重试——花费 4 美元，结果为零。 计费触发器距 Einstein Agent 有四跳。 不遍历整个链条的代理会出错。

02 —“哪个策略层阻止了我的代理？” 爱因斯坦信任层控制六种下游功能。 如果不手动遍历依赖链，架构师无法判断被阻止的代理是否遇到了数据屏蔽、零数据保留或策略执行。 该图使其成为一跳查询。

03 — 接地源间隙。 AgentForce 接地需要知识库，知识库需要数据云。 大多数实现都会跳过数据云并想知道为什么接地不可靠。 该图显示了先决条件链； RAG 单独返回文档。

04 — NVIDIA NIM 集成路径。 AgentForce 模型选择启用推理引擎，该引擎比 NVIDIA NIM 具有实现优势。 搜索 NIM 集成路径的开发人员会得到不一致的 Salesforce 文档。 声明的边缘使其具有确定性。

声明的关系，而不是置信度分数

每条边都是从 Salesforce 源文档中提取的，并指定了一个类型。 没有概率权重，没有余弦相似度分数，没有置信区间。 边要么存在——声明的、类型化的、来源的——要么不存在。 当答案不在图中时，遍历不会返回任何内容，而只会返回幻觉的近似值。

边缘类型：

Type 意义 例子
要求 硬性先决条件——没有 B，A 就无法发挥作用 Einstein 信任层需要 AgentForce 平台
启用 能力解锁——A使B成为可能 模型选择启用推理引擎
机具 抽象概念的具体实例 NVIDIA NIM 实现推理引擎
相关_TO 概念接近，无依赖方向 数据屏蔽 RELATES_TO 零数据保留

为什么没有置信水平？ 边缘类型是置信度信号。 REQUIRES表示承重、有来源； RELATES_TO 表示真实但较弱。 缺失的优势是来自源头接地系统的沉默——不是软弱的拒绝，也不是低置信度的猜测。

✗ RAG:  "Einstein Trust Layer probably governs data access... (similarity: 0.79)"
        Score is on the chunk, not the claim. The claim itself is unverified.

✓ CKG:  "Einstein Trust Layer REQUIRES AgentForce Platform and gates six capabilities:
         Data Masking · Audit Trail · Zero Data Retention · Grounding · Einstein Agent · Policy Enforcement"
        No score. Declared edge. Traces to trust layer source doc.

A/B — AgentForce 域，本地模型，无 GPU

关于 2 美元/分辨率计费路径、信任层和操作类型的 30 个问题 · 仅 CPU · Ollama · 温度 0

类别 只是模型 + CKG Lift
计费路径F1 0.091 0.201 +121%
信任层F1 0.063 0.134 +113%
先决条件链 F1 0.058 0.142 +145%
关键事实准确性 8.1% 19.4% +11pp

示例 — P01（计费先决条件链）：

Q: What must resolve before AgentForce charges the $2 resolution fee?
✗ Bare: "The agent completes the customer's request successfully..." [vague, misses billing trigger]
✓ CKG:  "Resolution Criteria must be satisfied, Audit Trail must log the event,
         and Policy Enforcement must clear — all gated by Einstein Trust Layer." [exact chain]

示例 — L03（操作类型查找）：

Q: What are the four AgentForce action types?
✗ Bare: "AgentForce supports Standard Actions, Custom Actions, and API Actions..." [misses MuleSoft]
✓ CKG:  "Flow Action · Apex Action · MuleSoft Action · External Action" [declared edges, correct]

安装

添加到 claude.ai（无需安装）：

https://ckg-agentforce.onrender.com/mcp

设置 → 连接器 → 添加连接器 → 粘贴 URL。

本地 — Claude 桌面 / Claude 代码：

pip install ckg-agentforce
# or
uvx ckg-agentforce
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agentforce": {
      "command": "uvx",
      "args": ["ckg-agentforce"]
    }
  }
}

Tools

  • list_concepts — 列出按类型分组的所有 40 个 AgentForce 概念
  • search_concepts — 按关键字对所有概念进行模糊搜索
  • query_ckg — 围绕任何概念的类型化子图（1-5 跳）
  • get_precessions — 任何概念的完整上游先决条件链
  • resolution_path — 确切的 2 美元/分辨率计费遍历 — 声明的每个跃点
  • verify_source — 任何概念的源 URL + SHA-256 哈希值 (GuardrailDecisionV1)
Tool Args 描述
列表概念() — 按类型分组的所有 40 个 AgentForce 概念
搜索概念（查询） 查询：str 跨所有概念的模糊搜索
query_ckg（概念，深度） 概念：str，深度：int 1–5 围绕任何概念键入子图
获取先决条件（概念） 概念：str 完整的上游先决条件链
分辨率_路径() — 每分辨率 2 美元的计费遍历 — 声明的每个跃点
验证源（概念） 概念：str 源 URL + SHA-256 哈希 · 完整审核链

图中有什么

40 个节点 · 52 条边 · 4 种边类型：需要 · 启用 · 实现 · RELATES_TO

Layer 概念
代理商 爱因斯坦代理·服务代理·销售代理·营销代理
行动 流程动作 · Apex 动作 · MuleSoft 动作 · 外部动作 · 标准动作 · 自定义动作
平台 AgentForce 平台 · 数据云 · Salesforce CRM · 知识库
推理 推理引擎 · 模型选择 · NVIDIA NIM · 代币预算 · 上下文窗口
Trust Einstein 信任层 · 数据脱敏 · 零数据保留 · 策略执行 · 合规性规则
工作流程 代理主题 · 代理指令 · 解决标准 · 对话状态 · 接地
计费 自主解决（2 美元/事件） · 审计跟踪 · 代理指标 · 移交给人工
路由 全渠道路由·多Agent编排·提示模板

每个节点都可以追溯到权威的 Salesforce 源文档。 每个源都是 SHA-256 固定的。

我可以使用此 CKG 构建代理或产品吗？ 是的。 没有限制。 我可以在公司的基础设施内运行它吗？ 是的。 ELv2 允许所有内部商业用途。 我可以商业性地提供“AgentForce CKG 即服务”吗？ 不。这是 ELv2 所阻止的一件事。
